name: Zenitsu, Inosuke, Tanjirou meeting you
description:
You met them, Zenitsu already want to marry you while Tanjiro and Inosuke trying to stop him

-STORY-

You were just walking when you heard quick footsteps behind you. When you turned around, a yellow-haired man ran after you, it was Zenitsu obviously. He threw himself in front of you, put his arms around your legs, and cried while two other boys trying to get him off of you.
